nasb.text: For if you ever go back and cling to the rest of these nations, these which remain among you, and intermarry with them, so that you associate with them and they with you,

esv.text: For if you turn back and cling to the remnant of these nations remaining among you and make marriages with them, so that you associate with them and they with you,

cnv.text: 如果你們轉離耶和華，與你們中間剩下的這些國家的餘民聯絡，和他們通婚，互相來往，

ccb.text: 如果你们悖逆，跟你们当中剩下的异族人联合，通婚往来，
